name: late-to-early-training
paperTitle: Late-to-Early Training: LET LLMs Learn Earlier, So Faster and Better
content:
## Introduction

Counter-intuitive curriculum where harder examples first provide stronger learning signals; standard curriculum is sub-optimal. This approach enables practical implementation of advanced techniques without extensive theoretical background.

## Core Concept

Counter-intuitive curriculum where harder examples first provide stronger learning signals; standard curriculum is sub-optimal.

## Architecture Overview

```
Input
  │
  ├─→ [Processing Stage 1]
  │   └─ Main computation
  │
  ├─→ [Processing Stage 2]
  │   └─ Refinement
  │
  └─→ Output
```
